About Credits Updates Suggestions

About

      Wow! Someone clicked on the about page, thanks! Anyways, The reason I
      created this site was because I was bored and sick of school blocking all
      the fun sites. So just decided "Why not just make a site?" I have the
      ability to change the link, and I can add all of my favorite games. Soon
      enough, you can to! Well, you can suggest games aleast. So have fun with
      what we created
